macro.title: Reverse mortgages emerge as a tool in ‘gray divorce’ settlements
macro.what: Gray divorce rates doubled from 1990 to 2010, and reverse mortgages can fund equity buyouts for homeowners ages 62 or older.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Mortgage applications dip during holiday week as rates edge up
macro.what: MBA reports applications fell 2.2% for the week ending July 3, with refis down 4% and purchase activity down 1% on an adjusted basis.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Monthly Payments Tick Up For First Time in 8 Months As Home Prices Hit Record High
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: There Are Now Only 5 Major Metros Where A Typical Luxury Home Costs Less Than $1 Million
housing.what: The number of major metros where you can buy a luxury home for less than $1 million is down five from eight last year
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: Now’s the time: Market forces and AI align to make property management an appealing option for brokers
housing.what: Delistings and lower transaction volume are pressuring broker revenue
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: AI is changing mortgage lending. Business intelligence is making it possible.
housing.what: As AI spreads across the mortgage lifecycle, lenders are moving business intelligence from dashboards into automated workflows
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: The other half of the lake: Why lifecycle lending is becoming mortgages’ next growth strategy
housing.what: As purchase and refinance volumes remain limited, lenders are shifting to lifecycle lending to monetize existing borrower databases
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Luxury Homes Cost 9 Times More Than the Typical Homes in These South Florida “Wealth Magnet” Metros
housing.what: West Palm Beach, FL, where the typical luxury home costs 8.9 times more than the typical non luxury home, has the nation’s biggest luxury home price premium
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

notables.title: Real estate agents: Make your drive time work for you
notables.what: Real estate agent drive time can total about 5 hours a week
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Fiserv president Dhivya Suryadevara resigns, cites ‘good reason’
notables.what: The company's 8-K filing says Suryadevara will stay through July 31 as a non-executive employee during the transition to new leadership.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Former FHA Commissioner Frank Cassidy returns to Walker & Dunlop
notables.what: Frank Cassidy rejoined Walker & Dunlop after resigning from HUD, where he oversaw FHA’s $2 trillion portfolio and cut multifamily MIP.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Reggora receives GSE verification for UAD 3.6 appraisal forms platform
notables.what: Reggora can now be used during the government-sponsored enterprises' Broad Production Period ahead of a looming compliance deadline.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Brands by Integra expands in Georgia
notables.what: The acquired brokerage has grown to nearly 100 agents serving the greater Atlanta and middle Georgia markets.
